Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, low serum protein and globulin, and significant proteinuria, glycosuria, and ketonuria, with abnormal urine appearance (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal). These findings suggest impaired renal function, likely nephrotic-range proteinuria, and possible tubular dysfunction. The presence of glycosuria with normal blood glucose may indicate renal glycosuria. Further nephrological evaluation is recommended.
